title: Heterotropa minamitaniana
taxonomy: Heterotropa minamitaniana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Burmanniaceae. This family is a group of small, non-photosynthetic plants that obtain their nutrients by parasitizing fungi. The Burmanniaceae family is part of the larger order of Asparagales, which includes plants with flowers that are often bell-shaped. Heterotropa minamitaniana is a unique species within this family, found in Japan. It is often classified as a species of rare and endangered plants due to habitat loss and limited distribution.
